codeReview.summary: The implementation fully satisfies all feature requirements. The delete, resolve, and list --unresolved commands are correctly implemented with ID prefix support (4-character minimum), confirmation prompts, and JSON output. The resolved field is properly added to the Spike struct with appropriate helper methods. All 37 integration tests pass, plus additional unit tests for the new storage and spike model functionality.

summary: Feature fully implemented and passes scrutiny. All requirements met: delete with --force and ID prefix support, resolve with --unresolve and ISO 8601 timestamps, list --unresolved filter that composes with existing filters. Comprehensive test coverage including unit tests for spike model, storage functions, and integration tests for CLI commands. No blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
